changes: Provoke: Enmity generated has been increased.
Holy Spirit: Potency increased from 270 to 280.
Requiescat: Potency increased from 540 to 560.
Blade of Faith: Potency increased from 420 to 460.
Blade of Truth: Potency increased from 500 to 540.
Blade of Valor: Potency increased from 580 to 620.
Maim: Potency increased from 130 to 150; Combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Storm's Path: Potency increased from 120 to 130; Combo potency increased from 400 to 410.
Storm's Eye: Potency increased from 120 to 130; Combo potency increased from 400 to 410.
Shake It Off: Effects of this action will now be applied more quickly.
Abyssal Drain: Potency increased from 150 to 240.

Living Shadow: Effect duration reduced from 24 to 20 seconds; The simulacrum will now always attack the first target the player attacks after it is summoned; The simulacrum will no longer attack with Quietus; Shadowbringer potency increased from 450 to 500; Potency of all other simulacrum actions increased from 300 to 350.
Brutal Shell: Potency increased from 120 to 130; Combo potency increased from 260 to 270.
Solid Barrel: Potency increased from 120 to 140; Combo potency increased from 340 to 360.
Jugular Rip: Range increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Abdomen Tear: Range increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Eye Gouge: Range increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Fated Circle: Potency increased from 290 to 300.
Bloodfest: Recast time increased from 90 to 120 seconds.
Hypervelocity: Range increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Blasting Zone: Potency increased from 700 to 720.
Double Down: Reduction in potency after the first target changed from 20% to 15%.
Jump: No longer replaced by Mirage Dive; Mirage Dive must be set to hotbar separately; Jump recast timer no longer affects Mirage Dive execution.
High Jump: No longer replaced by Mirage Dive; Mirage Dive must be set to hotbar separately; High Jump recast timer no longer affects Mirage Dive execution.
Tenka Goken: Potency increased from 280 to 300.
Hissatsu: Kyuten: Potency increased from 110 to 120.
Hissatsu: Guren: Reduction in potency after the first target changed from 50% to 25%.
Kaeshi: Goken: Potency increased from 280 to 300.
Slice: Potency increased from 300 to 320.
Waxing Slice: Potency increased from 140 to 160; Combo potency increased from 380 to 400.
Infernal Slice: Potency increased from 140 to 180; Combo potency increased from 460 to 500.
Death Scythe Mastery II: New trait at level 84 increasing potencies of Slice, Waxing Slice, and Infernal Slice.
Rook Autoturret: Duration fixed at 9 seconds; Base potency reduced from 70 to 35; Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds cost, up to 75.
Rook Overdrive: Base potency reduced from 320 to 160; Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds cost, up to 320.
Rook Overload: Base potency reduced from 320 to 160; Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds cost, up to 320.
Automaton Queen: Always attacks first target player attacks; Duration fixed at 12 seconds; Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds cost.
Roller Dash: Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds cost (min 240, max 480).
Arm Punch: Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds cost (min 120, max 240).
Liturgy of the Bell: Effect duration increased from 15 to 20 seconds.
Embrace: No longer generates enmity.
Seraphic Veil: No longer generates enmity.
Fey Union: No longer generates enmity when activating HP restoration.
Redraw: Drawn card will never have the same Astrosign as the current card.
Minor Arcana: Action now changes to the drawn arcanum.
Crown Play: Removed.
Kardia: No longer generates enmity when activating HP restoration.
Holos: Added effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equaling the amount of HP restored (Duration 30s).
Bloodwhetting: Portion of damage absorbed as HP has been increased from 75% to 100%.
Draw and Junction: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 20 seconds.
Meteodrive: Time required to fill the limit gauge has been increased.
Chaotic Spring: Portion of damage absorbed as HP has been increased from 100% to 150%.
Horrid Roar: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 25 seconds.
Hissatsu: Chiten: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 25 seconds.
Seiton Tenchu: The effect duration of Unsealed Seiton Tenchu is now reduced by 1s each time it is applied to a target with a minimum duration of 4s.
Chain Saw: Additional damage dealt when under the effect of Analysis has been reduced from 100% of target's HP to 95% of target's HP.
Slipstream: Now grants increased movement speed to party members standing in the Slipstream.
Afflatus Misery: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Aquaveil: Barrier strength has been increased from a heal potency of 6,000 to 8,000.
Miracle of Nature: Range has been reduced from 25 to 15 yalms.
Seraph Strike: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Cure III: Cure potency has been increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Adloquium: Increase to potency has been changed from 10% to 8%.
Biolysis: Increase to potency has been changed from 10% to 8%.
New PvP action added: The Bole (Reduces damage taken by 10% for 15s).
New PvP action added: The Arrow (Reduces weaponskill/spell cast and recast time by 10%, increases movement speed for 10s).
The Ewer (Removed).
The Spire (Removed).

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Abyssos
new_content.description: A new raid dungeon containing four circles.

new_content.name: Containment Bay S1T7 (Unreal)
new_content.description: A new unreal trial replacing Ultima's Bane (Unreal).

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: A personal paradise where players can collect resources, build accommodations, and grow crops.

new_content.name: An Unwelcome Visitor
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Soaring Profits
new_content.description: Tataru's Grand Endeavor side story quest.

new_content.name: Adventurer Plates
new_content.description: Official release of the personalized calling card system.

new_content.name: Portraits
new_content.description: Official release of the portrait customization system for gear sets.

new_content.name: Gear Repair Requests
new_content.description: System allowing players to request repairs from party and alliance members.

new_content.name: Dynamic Resolution
new_content.description: Graphics feature that reduces 3D resolution during heavy GPU load to improve frame rates.

housing.name: Leveilleur Estate Interior Wall
housing.description: Adopt the modest─yet still somehow incredibly expensive─style of the Leveilleur estate walls.

housing.name: Leveilleur Estate Flooring
housing.description: Live like a Leveilleur lord or lady with this fancy flooring beneath your feet.

housing.name: Leveilleur Estate Chandelier
housing.description: A light fixture crafted to resemble the opulent chandeliers of the Leveilleur estate. Not an actual chandelier from the Leveilleur estate.

housing.name: Damaged Highland Turret
housing.description: The ruined shell of a watchtower, transported stone by stone from the wilds of Coerthas.

housing.name: Shoveled Snow
housing.description: A never-melting pile of pristine white snow. Snow shovels included.

housing.name: Far Eastern Well
housing.description: A well of wood and stone that wouldn't look out of place in some remote Far Eastern settlement.

housing.name: Far Eastern Lamppost
housing.description: A tile-roofed lamppost such as one might find on the streets of Kugane.

housing.name: Elpis Stone Pillar
housing.description: Crowned with lush greenery, this pillar puts one in mind of ancient gardens.

housing.name: Chocobo Stable Essentials
housing.description: Everything a budding breeder needs to raise strong, healthy chocobos.

housing.name: Camping Tent
housing.description: Camp out under the stars in the privacy of your own backyard.

housing.name: Bamboo Fence
housing.description: A garden partition evoking a distinctly Far Eastern aesthetic.

housing.name: Camping Furniture
housing.description: A set of outdoor furniture constructed of weather-resistant materials.

housing.name: Gaol Partition Door
housing.description: A partition with a built-in door. Allows you access to your self-made prison.

housing.name: Gaol Partition
housing.description: A wall of sturdy bars reaching from floor to ceiling. For that "woke up on the wrong side of the law" feeling.

housing.name: Kugane Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the vibrancy of a nighttime Kugane.

housing.name: Costa del Sol Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a languid scene of Costa del Sol on a typical summer's day.

housing.name: Garlean Stove
housing.description: A magitek heating device common in the frozen climes of Garlemald.

housing.name: Farmer's Straw Bed
housing.description: A comfy pile to lay back on and dream of swaying fields of wheat.

housing.name: Mummer's Shelf
housing.description: A shelving unit stocked with various tools and costume pieces one might use in a theatrical production.

housing.name: Simple Basket
housing.description: The sort of simple, square basket one might fill with simple, square things.

housing.name: Coconut Water
housing.description: An invigorating liquid served as nature intended─with a straw and an oversized bunch of vivid floral garnishes.

housing.name: Cheese Fondue Set
housing.description: A steaming pot complete with fondue forks and an assortment of foods to slather in delicious, dripping cheese.

housing.name: Rousing Chronometer
housing.description: Though it sits in foreboding silence, you can easily imagine the jarring, clanging cacophony this object will make at the designated hour.

housing.name: Countertop Coffee Service
housing.description: An elegantly simple coffee service designed to complement any décor.

housing.name: Storm's Crown Sword Stand
housing.description: Enveloped in swirling winds, this impressive greatsword exudes a palpable sense of power.

housing.name: Wall-climbing Ivy
housing.description: These obstinate vines will survive anywhere. Anywhere.

housing.name: Hydaelyn, as We Know Her
housing.description: A map of Hydaelyn as drawn by a Baldesion cartographer. The "unknown" regions are obscured by billowing clouds.

housing.name: Wall-mounted Wings
housing.description: An ornamental pair of feathery wings to brighten up a plain wall.

housing.name: Flagstone Steps
housing.description: Where these stone stairs lead is entirely up to you.

housing.name: Flagstone Loft
housing.description: This heavy stone platform requires surprisingly little in the way of support.

housing.name: Exciting Neon Wall Light
housing.description: The incessant flashing of these lights keeps you alert and on your toes─just like the Excitatron 6000.

housing.name: Bill of Contrition (S-1)
housing.description: An illustrated apology issued in lieu of a receipt for a first-class plot of small size. Purchased with gil unintentionally refunded by lottery processing mishaps.

housing.name: Bill of Deep Contrition (M-1)
housing.description: An illustrated apology issued in lieu of a receipt for a first-class plot of medium size. Purchased with gil unintentionally refunded by lottery processing mishaps.

housing.name: Bill of Deepest Contrition (L-1)
housing.description: An illustrated apology issued in lieu of a receipt for a first-class plot of large size. Purchased with gil unintentionally refunded by lottery processing mishaps.

housing.name: Beyond Gloam's Veil
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Y'shtola Rhul entitled Beyond Gloam's Veil.

housing.name: Love and Loss
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Thancred Waters entitled Love and Loss.

housing.name: Wherewith We Learn
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Urianger Augurelt entitled Wherewith We Learn.

housing.name: Business's Pleasure
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Tataru Taru entitled Business's Pleasure.

housing.name: Scion of Wisdom
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Alphinaud Leveilleur entitled Scion of Wisdom.

housing.name: Scion of Valor
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Alisaie Leveilleur entitled Scion of Valor.

housing.name: Discernment
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Krile Baldesion entitled Discernment.

housing.name: Adventure Calls
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of G'raha Tia entitled Adventure Calls.

housing.name: Imitation Stained Crystal Roundel
housing.description: All the beauty of the original imitation stained crystal pane without the sharp edges.

housing.name: Hanging Planter Branch
housing.description: A set of hanging potted plants that come with their own handy branch.

housing.name: Wondrous Windoor
housing.description: You thought it was door, but it was actually window.

housing.name: Side-tied Curtain
housing.description: A flowing curtain tied to one side with a decorative cord.

housing.name: Korpokkur Chronometer
housing.description: This woodwork wall-mounted clock includes a cheery korpokkur design.

housing.name: Natural Wooden Beam
housing.description: This wooden beam retains a natural, unfinished appearance.

housing.name: Bill of Contrition (S-2)
housing.description: An illustrated apology issued in lieu of a receipt for a second-class plot of small size. Purchased with gil unintentionally refunded by lottery processing mishaps.

housing.name: Bill of Contrition (S-3)
